description: Processes user_feedback to update strategy_markdown and resume_diffs, looping back to HumanReviewNode.

userStories.title: Incorporate user feedback into strategy and resume diffs
userStories.description: As an applicant, I want the AI to incorporate my feedback to generate an updated strategy and resume diffs, so that the tailored resume accurately reflects my preferences before generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the child graph is at the human_review node and the user has provided user_feedback
Then the routing logic routes to the revise_strategy node
Then the revise_strategy node prompts the LLM with the feedback and previous strategy to generate a new strategy_markdown and resume_diffs
Then the child graph loops back to the human_review node to await approval again

tasks.description: Define the prompt for the Revise Strategy Node in templates.MD or prompts.yaml.
Implement the revise_strategy node logic using the LLM with structured output matching StrategyGeneratorNode.
Add revise_strategy to child_graph.py and implement the conditional routing from human_review based on status or user_feedback.
Write a pytest to verify that the revise_strategy node correctly updates the strategy and diffs based on feedback.

userStories.notes: Ensure that the Revise Strategy Node uses gpt-4o as it requires heavy reasoning, similar to the original Strategy Node.
